title: Greenie (disambiguation)
content:
'''Greenie''' or '''greeny''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Greenie]]''', a nickname given by the [[Galactic Empire]] to a [[Homeworld|native]] [[species]] of [[Mimban]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*[[Mimbanite]], a green-furred species from [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]].
*An inexperienced person.

{{Disambig}}
